data.message: The current system status shows 2 total users with 1 whitelisted user. Both users have been active in the last 7 and 30 days. There is 1 workspace and 1 organization in the system. In the last 24 hours, 54 jobs have been processed.

data.query:
// AI-generated query for: Show me the top 5 slowest requests in the last hour
requests
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize count() by name
data.question: Show me the top 5 slowest requests in the last hour
